# InventoryManager

## Overview
InventoryManager is a simple inventory tracking system for managing ingredients, recipes, and stock for restaurants or stores.  
This repository demonstrates Agile Scrum project management using GitHub Issues and GitHub Projects.

## Features
- Add inventory items
- Edit inventory items
- Delete inventory items
- View current inventory levels
- Track inventory additions and usage
- Display low-stock alerts

## Agile Workflow
This project demonstrates Agile Scrum practices:

- Product Backlog managed with GitHub Issues
- User stories representing system features
- Sprint planning using GitHub Projects
- Story point estimation
- Workflow board (To Do → In Progress → Done)
